title: Xeraea lundii
taxonomy: Xeraea lundii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The classification of Xeraea lundii includes its kingdom as Plantae, its phylum as Magnoliophyta, and its class as Magnoliopsida. Its order is Gentianales, and its family is indeed Rubiaceae. As a member of the Rubiaceae family, Xeraea lundii is closely related to other plants in the same family, such as the coffee and gardenia plants.
